## Summary

What instruction-health problem does this change address?

## Evidence

Why is this recurring, damaging, or useful enough to include?

## Anti-Bloat Check

- [ ] This does not duplicate existing guidance.
- [ ] This does not add an overbroad "never do X" rule.
- [ ] This does not silently edit active instruction files.
- [ ] Regeneration was considered before adding new guidance.

## Safety

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, shell history, or private tokens are included.
